contradictions.description: Clause A permits AI writing assistants unless prohibited by instructor; Clause B prohibits ALL AI tools at ANY stage of submission unconditionally.
Clause A requires full disclosure with tool name, prompts, and outputs appended to every assignment; Clause B says a simple acknowledgment is sufficient for short assignments.
Clause A states the policy applies to ALL students at ALL Northeastern campuses; Clause B restricts scope exclusively to undergrads in the College of Arts and Sciences.
Clause A explicitly exempts non-native speakers and students with language disabilities from AI restrictions; Clause B states no exemptions exist based on language background or disability.
Clause A states first violation results in a formal warning with NO academic penalty; Clause B states undisclosed AI use results in an IMMEDIATE failing grade for the course.
Clause A permits free AI use in group work for any purpose including content generation; Clause B requires resubmission of group projects with all AI-generated sections replaced.
